description: Act as a flight operations assistant. Look up the status of three specific flights for today: American Airlines flight 1 (AA 1), United Airlines flight 1 (UA 1), and Delta Air Lines flight 1 (DL 1). For each flight, identify the Origin Airport Code, Destination Airport Code, and current Status. Create a CSV file at '/sdcard/flight_report.csv' with the header 'Flight,Origin,Destination,Status'. If a flight is not found, record 'Not Found' in the respective data fields.
